title: Food Plus Mod
description: A Simple Fabric Mod That Adds New Foods To The Game!
body:
Food Plus is a mod that adds quite a few of survival friendly foods to the game,
it currently adds the following:

Banana,
Cheese Sandwich,
Bacon,
Corn,
Grilled Cheese Sandwich,
Jelly,
Lettuce,
Peanut Butter And Jelly Sandwich,
Peanut,
Pepper,
Strawberry,
Fries,
BLT Sandwich,
Cheese,
Cheese Burger,
Fries with Ketchup,
Sandwich Bread,
Tomato.

More Features are planned!

**THIS MOD IS FOR FABRIC ONLY, A FORGE PORT IS NOT PLANNED. YOU CAN PORT IT IF YOU WISH TO DO SO.**
